windows.embed_text_v2: animated YouTube outro end card, like comment subscribe call-to-action buttons, heart and bell icons, gradient graphics on black background, channel logo badge
windows.summary_v2: Animated outro/end-card sequence cycling through 'see you next time', like, comment and subscribe call-to-action buttons on a black background.

tags_v2.on_screen_text: CAN'T WAIT TO SEE YOU AGAIN NEXT TIME, LIKE IT!, COMMENT, SUBSCRIBE, Coastal Living Down Under

seconds_v2.desc: End-card animation on black: bold text 'CAN'T WAIT TO SEE YOU AGAIN NEXT TIME' over colourful rounded shapes, with a small 'Coastal Living Down Under' channel logo and candle photo in the lower-right corner.
Animated pink-orange 'LIKE IT!' button with a heart icon pops up amid scattered confetti shapes on black; channel logo badge stays in the corner.
The 'LIKE IT!' heart button sits centered on black background; corner channel logo remains.
Outline-style animated text box reading 'COMMENT' begins forming with neon gradient edges on black.
Animated 'COMMENT' button with speech-bubble icon and gradient fill appears surrounded by small geometric confetti shapes.
The gradient 'COMMENT' button shown centered on black; channel logo badge in the corner.
Outline 'SUBSCRIBE' button with a bell icon and rainbow gradient border animates in on black.
Filled gradient 'SUBSCRIBE' button with bell icon displayed with small floating shapes around it.
The 'SUBSCRIBE' bell button sits centered on black background; 'Coastal Living Down Under' logo badge stays in the lower-right corner.
